name: Financial Advisory & Insurance
description: Financial planning, investment advice, insurance guidance. Requires 2 verified regulatory or institutional sources. Highly restricted fallback.

strategy_descriptions.regulatory_sources: SEC, FINRA, CFPB, and regulatory body publications
strategy_descriptions.financial_institutions: Federal Reserve, central banks, major financial institutions
strategy_descriptions.certified_advisor_associations: CFP Board, NAPFA, CFA Institute publications
strategy_descriptions.industry_research: Financial industry research and trend reports
strategy_descriptions.textbooks_finance: Financial textbooks and certified education materials

claim_types.regulatory: Rules from SEC, FINRA, CFPB, or similar bodies

replacement_source_strategies.notes: Prefer regulator and government sources for compliance-related claims

authority_descriptions.ADVISOR_EXPERTISE: Professional financial advisor experience and perspective
authority_descriptions.INDUSTRY_STANDARDS: Accepted best practices in financial advisory

claim_repositioning.description: Reframe financial claims as general advisor guidance, not specific advice

replacements.new: Many clients find it helpful to...

claim_repositioning.authority_phrase: Based on [X] years of financial advisory experience
authority_phrase_examples: In our practice advising hundreds of clients
Drawing on our team's combined experience
Based on conversations with clients in this situation

notes: Financial advice carries significant legal/liability concerns. Fallback mode is restricted to general concepts only. Specific investment advice, returns projections, and regulatory interpretation MUST have sources. Consider requiring 3-4 sources for investment-focused content.
